_meta.purpose: Hand-verified MFR Key Performance Indicator values, extracted from the DBM Managing for Results Annual Performance Reports (2015–2026). Every value here was cross-checked against the underlying PDF on 2026-04-21. Use this file as the authoritative source for any site narrative that references an MFR KPI; do not hardcode MFR values elsewhere.
_meta.publisher: Maryland Department of Budget and Management, Office of Budget Analysis
_meta.report_year_note: MFR uses 'Report Year' (RY) which typically corresponds to the state fiscal year ending in that calendar year. Most recent MFRs report RY2022–RY2026 to normalize across metrics.
_meta.assessment_transition_note: Maryland replaced PARCC with MCAP starting school year 2018-2019. Pre-RY2019 proficiency percentages are NOT directly comparable to post-RY2019 values; the 2022 MFR report omitted RY2021 assessment data entirely for this reason.

kpis.indicator: Four-Year High School graduation rate (Cohort Rate)
kpis.source: 2026 MFR Annual Performance Report, Priority 2, KPI 2.7 (MSDE); cross-checked against 2025 MFR Report KPI 2.7

historical_narrative_value_2016.note: From 2020 MFR narrative p.16: 'from 86.4% in 2016 to 87.1% in 2020'.

kpis.indicator: Percent of grade 3 students scoring at or above Proficient on the Grade 3 English Language Arts (ELA) assessment (MCAP)
kpis.source: 2026 MFR Annual Performance Report, Priority 2, KPI 2.5
kpis.source_note: No assessment scores in RY2021. RY2022 values omitted from 2026 MFR because they used a three-level grading system (MCAP changed to four-level beginning RY2023).

kpis.indicator: Percent of kindergarten students scoring at the Demonstrating Readiness level on the Kindergarten Readiness Assessment (KRA)
kpis.source: 2026 MFR Annual Performance Report, Priority 2, KPI 2.6
kpis.source_note: Data for 2024-2025 school year (RY2026) unavailable — MSDE suspended KRA to train LEAs on new assessment for 2025-2026.

kpis.indicator: Grade 4 ELA — Percent scoring Proficient or above (MCAP)
kpis.source: 2024 MFR Annual Performance Report, MSDE detail table (page referencing Grade 3-8 proficiency by subject)

kpis.indicator: Grade 4 Math — Percent scoring Proficient or above (MCAP)
kpis.source: 2024 MFR Annual Performance Report, MSDE detail table
kpis.hallucination_note: Earlier site copy showed Grade 4 Math 2024 = 38% — not supported by any MFR. MFR reports 28.6% for RY2024. 10-point discrepancy was removed from EducationStoryChart.tsx on 2026-04-21.

kpis.indicator: Percent of students that are chronically absent
kpis.source: 2026 MFR Annual Performance Report, Priority 2, KPI 2.11 (detail table); 2025 MFR confirms RY2025 actual
kpis.source_note: Metric first appeared in post-pandemic MFRs; pre-RY2020 baselines not reported in the MFR series. 2026 MFR footnote points readers to MSDE's 2027 MFR Report for newer per-student variants.

kpis.indicator: Number of individuals enrolled in Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP)
kpis.source: 2026 MFR Annual Performance Report, Priority 1, KPI 1.3
kpis.source_note: MFR flags this as a 'variable' metric (has both favorable and unfavorable aspects).

kpis.source: 2026 MFR Annual Performance Report, Priority 3, KPI 3.9

hallucinations_found_and_corrected.correction: Replaced outcome strip with four MFR-verified KPIs over the RY2022→RY2025 window (HS Grad, Grade 3 ELA, KRA, Chronic Absenteeism); rewrote deck to match MFR narrative and acknowledge shorter comparison window.
